copy.heroHeadline: Simple, effective vinyasa — grounded in neuroscience.
copy.heroSub: Practice at home with free YouTube flows, follow on Instagram, and book paid live Zoom classes when you want structure and feedback.
copy.about: I’m Myriam — a vinyasa yoga teacher with a PhD in clinical and cognitive neuroscience. I create classes that feel good in the body and support calm, focus, and recovery.
copy.aboutExample: Example: if you’re stressed after work, we’ll use longer exhales and slower transitions. If you feel low-energy, we’ll build heat safely with clear progressions.
copy.studioNote: Available for substitutes / cover classes and community offerings in Zürich. Vinyasa-focused, clear cueing, adaptable sequencing.
copy.oneLineBio: Myriam teaches creative vinyasa yoga and brings a clinical neuroscience background to clear, supportive classes.
